name: First Northwest Bancorp
summary: First Northwest Bancorp is a Washington-based bank holding company operating through its wholly owned subsidiary First Fed Bank, a community commercial bank founded in 1923. First Fed offers residential mortgage loans, commercial real estate, multi-family, commercial business, auto, consumer, and construction loans, as well as transaction accounts, savings, money market accounts, and CDs. It operates 17 locations across six Washington counties and holds limited partnership investments in fintech-focused funds.
